opinion.h: Isaiah H. SPEARS, petitioner, v. UNITED STATES of America. No. 98, Misc.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Isaiah H. Spears, for petitioners.
Solicitor General Perlman, Assistant Attorney General Baldridge and Mr. Samuel D. Slade, for the United States.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the Court of Appeals for the Ninth Circuit.
Denied.[ Spears v. United States 342 U.S. 854 (1951) ]
